critical_repairs: SyntaxError 1: ; inside ${...} template expression killed entire JS script -> blank engine. Fixed.
SyntaxError 2: propAcc ternary had stray ; inside ${}. Fixed.
Validator check 23 added: recursive TL expression parser catches ; in ${} before every push

critical_rules: NEVER re-enable service worker — caused weeks of blank page issues
NEVER use spawned sub-agents for large edits — introduce syntax errors
ALWAYS validate: bt%2==0, braces balanced, LOCKED_PROPS x1, _origSaveP x1
ALWAYS copy app.html -> index.html after every edit
NEVER put ; as last char inside ${...} template expression — SyntaxError kills entire script
seedBetHistory() IIFE must be present in every push — never remove
renderHomePage() + endSplash() must be in DOMContentLoaded init block
#app must never have opacity:0 on load

github_token.note: One token handles everything. Never share in chat.

known_issues.write_social_copy: Python imports write_social_copy but content_generator.py exports write_social_json — content gen skipped every run
known_issues.renderSCFPreview_uncalled: Function exists, nhl-scf-preview div exists, but nothing calls renderSCFPreview()
known_issues.football_tab: NFL/CFB shows COMING SOON — no data source connected
known_issues.linemate_playwright: Only works on desktop — GitHub Actions uses --no-linemate flag
known_issues.custom_domain: clairvoyanceengine.info — Talos spam review may need resolution

validation_script:
python3 -c "
import re,json
html=open('docs/app.html').read()
scripts=list(re.finditer(r'<script([^>]*)>([\s\S]*?)</script>',html))
js=[s.group(2) for s in scripts if len(s.group(2))>10000][0]
bt=js.count('\x60'); op=js.count('{'); cl=js.count('}')
bets=json.load(open('docs/picks.json'))
w=sum(1 for b in bets if b.get('outcome')=='win')
l=sum(1 for b in bets if b.get('outcome')=='loss')
print(f'BT:{bt}(ok={bt%2==0}) Braces:{op}/{cl}(ok={op==cl})')
print(f'Picks:{len(bets)} {w}W-{l}L {w/(w+l)*100:.1f}%')
"
